global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a prominent sale message and a call-to-action.
global.main_message: Promoting a limited-time sale on a product.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and eye-catching base for the ad.

elements.label: Placeholder product image
elements.description: A simple outline of a product, represented as a light blue rectangle with a diagonal line, indicating a phone or similar device.

elements.label: Limited stock message
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Limited stock Only this weekend' is centrally positioned, conveying urgency.

elements.label: ThreadMark SALE headline
elements.description: The headline 'ThreadMark SALE' is prominently displayed at the top in large, bold text, with 'SALE' highlighted in yellow.

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A bright white button at the bottom with the text 'Shop now' in bold, encouraging immediate action.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, limited stock message, call-to-action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the product image is centered, the body text is below the product, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Limited stock Only this weekend, ThreadMark SALE, €19.99 Shop now
